body.title: /sprint plan-review — surface infrastructure brief for touched area
body.result: Seeded 8 palace nodes theigors/infrastructure/by_area/{cognition,memory,network,tools,reasoning,brainstem,index,parent}. Created sprint_infrastructure_brief.py (InfrastructureBrief class, area detection from paths, one-screen brief render). Updated /sprint skill step 4.5 to call brief + /audit-precode before first edit.
body.description:
Counter to architectural amnesia (Sonnet forgetting MCP / IMAP / proxy infrastructure exists). At /sprint plan-review (before audit-precode), surface a one-screen 'infrastructure brief' scoped to the touched area: relevant MCP tools, IMAP buses, proxies, channels, base classes. Built from theigors/subsystem_index + new palace branch theigors/infrastructure/by_area/<area>.

The brief is positive scaffolding — rules visible at point of use, not after the wrong choice (D-scaffold-not-correct-2026-04-21).

This ticket: build the by_area palace branch (initial seed: cognition, memory, network, tools, reasoning), update /sprint to surface it.

**Affected files:** /sprint skill SKILL.md (insert after plan-review, before audit-precode); new palace subtree theigors/infrastructure/by_area/*; helper at lab/claudecode/sprint_infrastructure_brief.py.
**Design rules:** no persistence beyond palace. oop-first: InfrastructureBrief class. docs-in-code: top-of-file docstring on the helper.
**Test plan:** sprint touches cognition → brief lists cognition MCP tools, base class, related buses. Sprint touches a not-yet-mapped area → brief flags 'no entry, propose adding'. Manual review confirms the brief is short (one screen) and relevant.
